1.kj: behold (by mistake for H7789 (שׁוּר)), sing(-er, -ing man, -ing woman).
1.dv: or (the original form) שׁוּר; (1 Samuel 18:6), a primitive root (rather identical with H7788 (שׁוּר) through the idea of strolling minstrelsy);

1.gl: the earth (at large, or partitively a land)
1.kj: [idiom] common, country, earth, field, ground, land, [idiom] natins, way, [phrase] wilderness, world.
1.dv: from an unused root probably meaning to be firm;

1.gl: Jehovah, Jewish national name of God
1.kj: Jehovah, the Lord. Compare H3050 (יָהּ), H3069 (יְהֹוִה).

2.gl: a day (as the warm hours), whether literal (from sunrise to sunset, or from one sunset to the next), or figurative (a space of time defined by an associated term), (often used adverb)
2.kj: age, [phrase] always, [phrase] chronicals, continually(-ance), daily, ((birth-), each, to) day, (now a, two) days (agone), [phrase] elder, [idiom] end, [phrase] evening, [phrase] (
2.dv: from an unused root meaning to be hot;

2.gl: to kneel; by implication to bless God (as an act of adoration), and (vice-versa) man (as a benefit); also (by euphemism) to curse (God or the king, as treason)
2.kj: [idiom] abundantly, [idiom] altogether, [idiom] at all, blaspheme, bless, congratulate, curse, [idiom] greatly, [idiom] indeed, kneel (down), praise, salute, [idiom] still, thank.

2.gl: an appellation, as amark or memorial of individuality; by implication honor, authority, character
2.dv: a primitive word (perhaps rather from through the idea of definite and conspicuous position; compare H8064 (שָׁמַיִם));

2.kj: behold (by mistake for H7789 (שׁוּר)), sing(-er, -ing man, -ing woman).
2.dv: or (the original form) שׁוּר; (1 Samuel 18:6), a primitive root (rather identical with H7788 (שׁוּר) through the idea of strolling minstrelsy);

2.gl: properly, to be fresh, i.e. full (rosy, (figuratively) cheerful); to announce (glad news)
2.kj: messenger, preach, publish, shew forth, (bear, bring, carry, preach, good, tell good) tidings.

2.gl: something saved, i.e. (abstractly) deliverance; hence, aid, victory, prosperity
2.kj: deliverance, health, help(-ing), salvation, save, saving (health), welfare.

3.gl: properly, perhaps to separate, i.e. distinguish (literally or figuratively); by implication, to be (causatively, make) great, difficult, wonderful
3.kj: accomplish, (arise...too, be too) hard, hidden, things too high, (be, do, do a, shew) marvelous(-ly, -els, things, work), miracles, perform, separate, make singular, (be, great, ma

3.gl: properly, to score with a mark as a tally or record, i.e. (by implication) to inscribe, and also to enumerate; intensively, to recount, i.e. celebrate
3.kj: commune, (ac-) count; declare, number, [phrase] penknife, reckon, scribe, shew forth, speak, talk, tell (out), writer.

3.gl: a foreign nation; hence, a Gentile; also (figuratively) a troop of animals, or a flight of locusts
3.dv: rarely (shortened) גֹּי; apparently from the same root as H1465 (גֵּוָה) (in the sense of massing);

3.gl: a people (as a congregated unit); specifically, a tribe (as those of Israel); hence (collectively) troops or attendants; figuratively, a flock
properly, weight, but only figuratively in a good sense, splendor or copiousness

4.gl: properly, vehemence, i.e. (with or without preposition) vehemently; by implication, wholly, speedily, etc. (often with other words as an intensive or superlative; especially when repeated)
4.kj: diligently, especially, exceeding(-ly), far, fast, good, great(-ly), [idiom] louder and louder, might(-ily, -y), (so) much, quickly, (so) sore, utterly, very ([phrase] much, sore),

4.gl: to be clear (orig. of sound, but usually of color); to shine; hence, to make ashow, to boast; and thus to be (clamorously) foolish; to rave; causatively, to celebrate; also to stultify
4.kj: (make) boast (self), celebrate, commend, (deal, make), fool(-ish, -ly), glory, give (light), be (make, feign self) mad (against), give in marriage, (sing, be worthy of) praise, rag

4.gl: gods in the ordinary sense; but specifically used (in the plural thus, especially with the article) of the supreme God; occasionally applied by way of deference to magistrates; and sometimes as a superlative
4.kj: angels, [idiom] exceeding, God (gods) (-dess, -ly), [idiom] (very) great, judges, [idiom] mighty.

4.gl: great (in any sense); hence, older; also insolent
4.kj: [phrase] aloud, elder(-est), [phrase] exceeding(-ly), [phrase] far, (man of) great (man, matter, thing,-er,-ness), high, long, loud, mighty, more, much, noble, proud thing, [idiom]

4.gl: to fear; morally, to revere; caus. to frighten
4.kj: affright, be (make) afraid, dread(-ful), (put in) fear(-ful, -fully, -ing), (be had in) reverence(-end), [idiom] see, terrible (act, -ness, thing).

4.gl: Jehovah, Jewish national name of God
4.kj: Jehovah, the Lord. Compare H3050 (יָהּ), H3069 (יְהֹוִה).

5.gl: to do or make, in the broadest sense and widest application
5.kj: accomplish, advance, appoint, apt, be at, become, bear, bestow, bring forth, bruise, be busy, [idiom] certainly, have the charge of, commit, deal (with), deck, [phrase] displease,

5.gl: gods in the ordinary sense; but specifically used (in the plural thus, especially with the article) of the supreme God; occasionally applied by way of deference to magistrates; and sometimes as a superlative
5.kj: angels, [idiom] exceeding, God (gods) (-dess, -ly), [idiom] (very) great, judges, [idiom] mighty.

5.gl: the sky (as aloft; the dual perhaps alluding to the visible arch in which the clouds move, as well as to the higher ether where the celestial bodies revolve)
5.dv: dual of an unused singular שָׁמֶה; from an unused root meaning to be lofty;

5.gl: a people (as a congregated unit); specifically, a tribe (as those of Israel); hence (collectively) troops or attendants; figuratively, a flock
Jehovah, Jewish national name of God
5.kj: Jehovah, the Lord. Compare H3050 (יָהּ), H3069 (יְהֹוִה).

5.gl: good for nothing, by anal. vain or vanity; specifically an idol
5.kj: idol, no value, thing of nought.

6.gl: the face (as the part that turns); used in a great variety of applications (literally and figuratively); also (with prepositional prefix) as a preposition (before, etc.)
6.kj: [phrase] accept, a-(be-) fore(-time), against, anger, [idiom] as (long as), at, [phrase] battle, [phrase] because (of), [phrase] beseech, countenance, edge, [phrase] employ, endure
6.dv: plural (but always as singular) of an unused noun פָּנֶה; from H6437 (פָּנָה));

6.gl: a consecrated thing or place, especially, a palace, sanctuary (whether of Jehovah or of idols) or asylum
6.kj: chapel, hallowed part, holy place, sanctuary.

6.gl: ornament (abstractly or concretely, literally or figuratively)
6.kj: beauty(-iful), bravery, comely, fair, glory(-ious), honour, majesty.

6.gl: strength in various applications (force, security, majesty, praise)
6.kj: boldness, loud, might, power, strength, strong.

6.gl: grandeur (i.e. an imposing form and appearance)
6.kj: beauty, comeliness, excellency, glorious, glory, goodly, honour, majesty.
beauty, comeliness, excellency, glorious, glory, goodly, honour, majesty.

a people (as a congregated unit); specifically, a tribe (as those of Israel); hence (collectively) troops or attendants; figuratively, a flock
to give (whether literal or figurative); generally, to put; imperatively (reflexive) come

strength in various applications (force, security, majesty, praise)

7.kj: Jehovah, the Lord. Compare H3050 (יָהּ), H3069 (יְהֹוִה).

8.gl: to lift, in a great variety of applications, literal and figurative, absolute and relative
8.kj: accept, advance, arise, (able to, (armor), suffer to) bear(-er, up), bring (forth), burn, carry (away), cast, contain, desire, ease, exact, exalt (self), extol, fetch, forgive, fur

8.gl: an appellation, as amark or memorial of individuality; by implication honor, authority, character
8.dv: a primitive word (perhaps rather from through the idea of definite and conspicuous position; compare H8064 (שָׁמַיִם));

8.gl: a donation; euphemistically, tribute; specifically a sacrificial offering (usually bloodless and voluntary)
8.dv: from an unused root meaning to apportion, i.e. bestow;

8.gl: a yard (as inclosed by a fence); also a hamlet (as similarly surrounded with walls)
8.dv: (masculine and feminine); from H2690 (חָצַר) in its original sense;

8.gl: to give (whether literal or figurative); generally, to put; imperatively (reflexive) come
8.kj: ascribe, bring, come on, give, go, set, take.

9.gl: the face (as the part that turns); used in a great variety of applications (literally and figuratively); also (with prepositional prefix) as a preposition (before, etc.)
9.kj: [phrase] accept, a-(be-) fore(-time), against, anger, [idiom] as (long as), at, [phrase] battle, [phrase] because (of), [phrase] beseech, countenance, edge, [phrase] employ, endure
9.dv: plural (but always as singular) of an unused noun פָּנֶה; from H6437 (פָּנָה));

9.gl: properly, to twist or whirl (in a circular or spiral manner), i.e. (specifically) to dance, to writhe in pain (especially of parturition) or fear; figuratively, to wait, to pervert
9.kj: bear, (make to) bring forth, (make to) calve, dance, drive away, fall grievously (with pain), fear, form, great, grieve, (be) grievous, hope, look, make, be in pain, be much (sore)

9.gl: to depress, i.e. prostrate (especially reflexive, in homage to royalty or God)
9.kj: bow (self) down, crouch, fall down (flat), humbly beseech, do (make) obeisance, do reverence, make to stoop, worship.

9.gl: a sacred place or thing; rarely abstract, sanctity
9.kj: consecrated (thing), dedicated (thing), hallowed (thing), holiness, ([idiom] most) holy ([idiom] day, portion, thing), saint, sanctuary.

9.gl: the earth (at large, or partitively a land)
9.kj: [idiom] common, country, earth, field, ground, land, [idiom] natins, way, [phrase] wilderness, world.
9.dv: from an unused root probably meaning to be firm;

9.gl: Jehovah, Jewish national name of God
9.kj: Jehovah, the Lord. Compare H3050 (יָהּ), H3069 (יְהֹוִה).

10.gl: evenness, i.e. (figuratively) prosperity or concord; also straightness, i.e. (figuratively) rectitude (only in plural with singular sense; often adverbially)
10.kj: agreement, aright, that are equal, equity, (things that are) right(-eously, things), sweetly, upright(-ly, -ness).

10.gl: to reign; inceptively, to ascend the throne; causatively, to induct into royalty; hence (by implication) to take counsel
10.kj: consult, [idiom] indeed, be (make, set a, set up) king, be (make) queen, (begin to, make to) reign(-ing), rule, [idiom] surely.

10.gl: meaning accession (used as an adverb or conjunction); also or yea; adversatively though
10.kj: also, [phrase] although, and (furthermore, yet), but, even, [phrase] how much less (more, rather than), moreover, with, yea.

10.gl: a foreign nation; hence, a Gentile; also (figuratively) a troop of animals, or a flight of locusts
10.dv: rarely (shortened) גֹּי; apparently from the same root as H1465 (גֵּוָה) (in the sense of massing);

11.gl: a sea (as breaking in noisy surf) or large body of water; specifically (with the article), the Mediterranean Sea; sometimes a large river, or an artifical basin; locally, the west, or (rarely) the south
11.dv: from an unused root meaning to roar;

11.gl: the sky (as aloft; the dual perhaps alluding to the visible arch in which the clouds move, as well as to the higher ether where the celestial bodies revolve)
11.dv: dual of an unused singular שָׁמֶה; from an unused root meaning to be lofty;

11.kj: [idiom] all along, [idiom] all that is (there-) in, fill, ([idiom] that whereof...was) full, fulness, (hand-) full, multitude.
11.dv: rarely מְלוֹא; or מְלוֹ; (Ezekiel [41:8), from H4390 (מָלֵא);

11.gl: probably to brighten up, i.e. (figuratively) be (causatively, make) blithe or gleesome
11.kj: cheer up, be (make) glad, (have, make) joy(-ful), be (make) merry, (cause to, make to) rejoice, [idiom] very.

11.gl: the earth (at large, or partitively a land)
11.kj: [idiom] common, country, earth, field, ground, land, [idiom] natins, way, [phrase] wilderness, world.
11.dv: from an unused root probably meaning to be firm;

11.kj: be glad, joy, be joyful, rejoice.
11.dv: or (by permutation) גּוּל; a primitive root;

12.gl: properly, to creak (or emit a stridulous sound), i.e. to shout (usually for joy)
12.kj: aloud for joy, cry out, be joyful (greatly, make to) rejoice, (cause to) shout (for joy), (cause to) sing (aloud, for joy, out), triumph.

12.gl: a tree (from its firmness); hence, wood (plural sticks)
12.kj: [phrase] carpenter, gallows, helve, [phrase] pine, plank, staff, stalk, stick, stock, timber, tree, wood.

12.gl: a copse of bushes; hence, a forest; hence, honey in the comb (as hived in trees)
12.dv: from an unused root probably meaning to thicken with verdure;

12.gl: at that time or place; also as a conjunction, therefore
12.kj: beginning, for, from, hitherto, now, of old, once, since, then, at which time, yet.
country, field, ground, land, soil, [idiom] wild.
12.dv: or שָׂדַי; from an unused root meaning to spread out;

13.gl: to judge, i.e. pronounce sentence (for or against); by implication, to vindicate or punish; by extenssion, to govern; passively, to litigate (literally or figuratively)
13.kj: [phrase] avenge, [idiom] that condemn, contend, defend, execute (judgment), (be a) judge(-ment), [idiom] needs, plead, reason, rule.

13.gl: the right (natural, moral or legal); also (abstractly) equity or (figuratively) prosperity
13.kj: [idiom] even, ([idiom] that which is altogether) just(-ice), (un-)right(-eous) (cause, -ly, -ness).

13.gl: the earth (as moist and therefore inhabited); by extension, the globe; by implication, its inhabitants; specifically, a particular land, as Babylonia, Palestine
literally firmness; figuratively security; morally fidelity
13.kj: faith(-ful, -ly, -ness, (man)), set office, stability, steady, truly, truth, verily.
